headline: Amphenol Drops 12% in a Month: Should You Buy the Stock on the Dip?
summary: APH slides 12.3% in a month, yet records $9.4B orders and AI demand rises as CCS debt and integration risks mount.

headline: Amphenol Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: As Amphenol has outperformed the SPX over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a bullish outlook on the stock’s prospects.

headline: Cramer Says Don't Chase ASML After $75 Jump—Wait For A Dip To Buy This 'Great' Semi Play
summary: Jim Cramer recommended buying Steel Dynamics (STLD) & Bloom Energy (BE). ASML & Amphenol (APH) reported strong earnings. Digi Power X (DGXX) upsized offering.
